name: Spicy Pork Strips with Black Fungus
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Szechuan hot sauce (halve-for non-chili lovers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak cloud ears in warm water for 45 minutes.
2. Slice pork into 2-inch strips with the grain; marinate in dark soy sauce while finishing preparations.
3. Slice bamboo shoots into 2-inch strips, and water chestnuts into thin rounds.
4. Mix Szechuan hot sauce with stock.
5. Thinly slice green onions on bias.
6. Drain, wash, and thinly slice cloud ears.
Stir-frying:
1. Heat wok to hot; add oil.
2. When oil begins to smoke, add pork and stir-fry for about 1 minute or until it looks slightly shriveled.
3. Toss in bamboo shoots, water chestnuts, cloud ears, and ginger, stirring with pork for another minute.
4. Pour in liquid ingredients quickly around the side of the wok.
5. Keep stirring until sauce reduces to almost nothing.
6. Add green onions at the last minute. Serve.
